title: MIN HE
text:
Reach me per email
  
  
    
     Github
  

  
  
My research interests lie in multimodal, large models, machine learning, visual language navigation, and embodied intelligence.



2026-Present: Master of Science, Nanyang Technological University, specializing in Machine Learning, under supervision of Prof. Lihua Xie.
2021-2025: Bachelor of Engineering (Honours), Chongqing University of Technology, majoring in Computer Science and Technology, under supervision of Prof. Xiaofei Zhu.





OmniVLN: Open-Set Instance-Level 3D Semantic Mapping with Rotating LiDAR and Panoramic Vision Under Research


To address the pain points of traditional large-scale model navigation in complex scenarios, such as limited field of vision, lack of spatial logic, and redundancy of reasoning tokens, we designed and engineered a 3D semantic mapping and hierarchical reasoning system with omnidirectional spatiotemporal consistency.


HSM-Net: A Multimodal Diagnostic Framework for Abdominal Trauma Based on Frequency Domain Denoising and LLM Prior Under Research


Proposed a robust diagnostic framework addressing speckle noise interference and multimodal semantic gaps in ultrasound diagnosis.


A Review of Data Fusion and Deep Learning Models for Multimodal Sentiment Analysis Completed


He, M. (2025). A Review of Data Fusion and Deep Learning Models for Multimodal Sentiment Analysis. In Proceedings of the 1st International Conference on E-commerce and Artificial Intelligence - ECAI; ISBN 978-989-758-726-9, SciTePress, pages 5-12. DOI: 10.5220/0013189700004568






Full-stack Development Engineer (Internship) | ZhuoRuiYuan(Suzhou)

2025.07 - 2025.08


Spearheaded the end-to-end design and independent development of an integrated asset management system, featuring a PC web admin console and a WeChat Mini-Program. This initiative successfully resolved critical issues of disorganized asset tracking, cumbersome workflows, and information silos.





Outstanding graduates of Chongqing, 2025
Outstanding Bachelor’s Thesis Award, 2025
National Scholarship, 2024
Second Prize in the National Undergraduate Data Statistics and Analysis Competition, 2023
Finalist Award in the CCF National Algorithm Elite Competition, 2023
Third Prize in the National Finals of the Team Programming Ladder Competition, 2023
First Prize in the National Undergraduate Mathematics Competition, 2023
Second Prize in the National Undergraduate Mathematical Modeling Competition, 2023

title: 中文简历
text:
何旻，男，中共党员。现就读于南洋理工大学电子与电气工程学院，研究方向为具身智能、视觉语言导航等。2025年毕业于重庆理工大学计算机科学与工程学院，获工学荣誉学士学位。

邮箱：MHE009@e.ntu.edu.sg
地址：新加坡南洋大道50号，邮编639798
个人主页：https://mhe009.github.io

title: 中文简历
text:
科研经历

OmniVLN：面向空地视觉语言导航的全方位3D感知和令牌高效LLM推理 在研


针对大规模复杂场景下传统大模型导航感知视野受限、空间逻辑缺失及推理Token冗余等痛点，设计并工程落地了一套全向时空一致性的3D语义建图与分层推理系统。


HSM-Net: 基于频域去噪与LLM先验的多模态腹部创伤诊断框架 在研


针对腹部创伤超声诊断中散斑噪声干扰及多模态语义鸿沟难题，本项目创新性地融合了频域感知去噪、大模型语义注入及混合专家动态路由机制。


A Review of Data Fusion and Deep Learning Models for Multimodal Sentiment Analysis. 已完成


He, M. (2025). A Review of Data Fusion and Deep Learning Models for Multimodal Sentiment Analysis. In Proceedings of the 1st International Conference on E-commerce and Artificial Intelligence - ECAI; ISBN 978-989-758-726-9, SciTePress, pages 5-12. DOI: 10.5220/0013189700004568

title: 中文简历
text:
实习经历


全栈开发工程师 (实习) | 卓瑞源(苏州)

2025.07 - 2025.08


为解决公司内部固定资产管理混乱、流程繁琐、信息孤岛等痛点，主导设计并独立开发了一套集PC Web管理后台与微信小程序于一体的多端协同管理系统。
